argument: The contested claim asserts that Juliati Alafate is the Co-Founder & CTO of Skillset, as supported by a self-reported claim from a source that lacks independent verification ([team-06]). The evidence indicates that while Juliati Alafate is indeed named as Co-Founder & CTO, there is no corroborative external evidence validating this title, such as formal press releases, public announcements, or registered documents. A targeted search for an official Form D or other regulatory filings related to Skillset reveals no such documentation, further calling into question the legitimacy of the role ([team-06]). This lack of verification suggests that the claim could be exaggerated or untrue. Even taking the claim at face value, it may be an informal arrangement, not substantiated by any recognized entity or public repository, thereby failing to meet the standards for accurate representation in a professional context.
